name: 10× PCR Buffer (Qiagen-Equivalent, Dual-Cation)
nameCn: 10× PCR 缓冲液（仿 Qiagen 双阳离子）

usage.en: Dual-cation 10× PCR buffer functionally equivalent to Qiagen's standard buffer. K⁺ and NH₄⁺ ions increase the annealing window and reduce non-specific amplification.
usage.zh: 仿 Qiagen 标准缓冲液的双阳离子 10× PCR buffer。K⁺ 和 NH₄⁺ 扩大退火窗口、降低非特异性扩增。

prepSteps.step: Add 1.0 mL of 1 M Tris-HCl (pH 8.7 at 20°C).
Add 5.35 mL nuclease-free water to reach 10.0 mL.
Vortex thoroughly. Aliquot 1 mL/tube. Store at -20°C.

notes.en: Use sterile nuclease-free stock solutions. Final 1× concentrations: 10 mM Tris-HCl, 50 mM KCl, 10 mM (NH₄)₂SO₄, 1.5 mM MgCl₂. Combine with 10× Cresol red dye for CoralLoad-equivalent PCR buffer.
notes.zh: 使用无菌无核酸酶的母液。1× 终浓度：10 mM Tris-HCl、50 mM KCl、10 mM (NH₄)₂SO₄、1.5 mM MgCl₂。可与 10× 甲酚红染料搭配使用。

ref: Reverse-engineered from Qiagen PCR Buffer specifications
